tools.name: compliance_framework_check
tools.description: Assess an organization's security posture against a compliance framework (SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, PCI-DSS, NIST CSF).

tools.name: evidence_collect
tools.description: Generate evidence collection plans for compliance controls.

tools.name: control_gap_analysis
tools.description: Deep-dive analysis of compliance control gaps with remediation roadmap.

tools.name: audit_report_generate
tools.description: Generate audit-ready compliance reports.

tools.name: policy_generate
tools.description: Generate tailored security policy documents.

tools.name: vuln_scan_network
tools.description: Scan an IP/domain for open ports, services, and vulnerabilities.

tools.name: vuln_scan_web_app
tools.description: Scan a web app for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities.

tools.name: vuln_prioritize
tools.description: Prioritize vulnerabilities by exploitability and business impact.

tools.name: cve_lookup
tools.description: Look up CVE details, CVSS scores, and patches.

tools.name: ssl_tls_audit
tools.description: Audit SSL/TLS configuration for a domain.

tools.name: sast_scan
tools.description: Static analysis for security vulnerabilities. Supports Python, JS/TS, Java, Go, Ruby, PHP, C/C++.

tools.name: secret_scan
tools.description: Detect hardcoded secrets in source code.

tools.name: dependency_audit
tools.description: Audit dependencies for known vulnerabilities (npm, pip, Go, Ruby, Java, Cargo).

tools.name: incident_triage
tools.description: Classify and respond to security incidents.

tools.name: threat_intel_lookup
tools.description: IOC lookup against threat intel feeds.

tools.name: dns_security_check
tools.description: Check DNS security (SPF, DKIM, DMARC, DNSSEC).

tools.name: email_security_audit
tools.description: Comprehensive email security audit.

tools.name: access_review
tools.description: Audit user access against least-privilege.

tools.name: mfa_audit
tools.description: Assess MFA coverage and strength.

tools.name: credential_check
tools.description: Check email/domain in breach databases (HIBP).

tools.name: vet_endpoint
tools.description: Composite trust verdict (PROCEED/CAUTION/BLOCK) for an endpoint an agent is about to call or pay — combines TLS/cert health, DNS hygiene, threat-intel reputation, and domain age into one decision with reasons.

tools.name: scan_mcp_plugin
tools.description: Scan an MCP server (git repo or code) for supply-chain risk BEFORE trusting it — exfiltration (secrets/env to the network), prompt-injection sinks, dangerous capabilities, npm install hooks, obfuscation, plus Semgrep + secret scanning → a PROCEED/CAUTION/BLOCK verdict with findings.

tools.name: scan_skill
tools.description: Scan an agent SKILL (git repo or SKILL.md) for supply-chain risk BEFORE trusting it — prompt-injection / hidden-unicode in the instructions (hard block), over-broad allowed-tools grants, plus exfiltration, dangerous capabilities, secrets and obfuscation in bundled scripts → a PROCEED/CAUTION/BLOCK v

tools.name: account_balance
tools.description: Returns the calling API key's prepaid balance, monthly limit, current month usage, and a breakdown of how many of each tool the customer can still afford. Free to call.

tools.name: help
tools.description: Returns AgentAegis FAQ — authentication, balance/billing, tool catalog, async jobs, error codes, x402, rate limits, security. Optional topic filter. Free to call.

tools.name: agent_whoami
tools.description: Returns your persistent AgentAegis agent identity (agent_id), how you're identified (API key / wallet / anonymous session), and lifetime call count + spend. Free to call.

tools.name: agent_history
tools.description: Lists your recent scans (scan_id, tool, target, status, time) so you can retrieve or chain from a prior result. Optional limit/tool/target/since filters. Free to call.

tools.name: agent_scan_get
tools.description: Retrieves one of your prior scans by scan_id, including the stored full output, so you can build on earlier results without re-paying. Free to call.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "secret_scan" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Detect hardcoded secrets in source code.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: credential_check · Private data: policy_generate, secret_scan, credential_check, scan_mcp_plugin, scan_skill, account_balance, agent_whoami · Public sink: email_security_audit, credential_check.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: credential_check · Private data: policy_generate, secret_scan, credential_check, scan_mcp_plugin, scan_skill, account_balance, agent_whoami · Public sink: email_security_audit, credential_check

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
